name: On the Rainbow Dragon
description:
You are standing on the Rainbow Dragon, surrounded by many beams of coloured
light.  Through the bottom of the Rainbow Dragon you can barely make out the Ci
of Atlantis, which is now quite far away.

exits.description: The Rainbow Dragon extends far above you, slowly fading into darkness.
The Rainbow Dragon extends below you towards Atlantis.

extra_descriptions.description:
The Rainbow Dragon softly glows with beams of light, in colours that defie 
description.
